generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance InsulatedStyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated styrofoam box with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm, controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s, controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system control"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs (handling 4A current) and optocouplers for signal decoupling between control signals and driving currents"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer (64-bit serial code)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer (64-bit serial code)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer (64-bit serial code)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3]
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model (C_air, G_box)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance ThermalSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for thermal behavior simulation using calibrated models",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time monitoring of thermal system using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for fault detection based on model predictions and sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data transmission",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted open-source code repository for version control",
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeVersioningService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal model parameters using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated models",
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on model predictions and sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting temperature data to RabbitMQ server",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance CodeVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin code",
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersioningInsight
]

instance AdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting physical twin operations in response to violations",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustmentAction
]

instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated thermal model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior for next time step"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current thermal system status for safety and optimal operation"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in thermal system"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of temperature data transmission to RabbitMQ"
]

instance CodeVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control status of digital twin code"
]

instance AdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust physical twin operations (e.g., turn on/off heatbed or fan) in response to violations",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system for regulating internal temperature regardless of content",
    base:contains [InsulatedStyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4ModelBController, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply, DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends heating/fan control commands via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan using MOSFETs based on bang-bang control logic with configurable lower/upper temperature limits (LL/UL), heating duration (H), and waiting duration (C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver (sensor/actuator interface), controller (bang-bang logic), and simulation models; interconnected via RabbitMQ for bidirectional data flow between physical and virtual components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital twin integrates models after the physical system is deployed for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as superior for predicting heatbed thermal inertia; calibration minimizes residual error via Scipy optimization; assumptions tested through sensor placement experiments showing temperature discrepancies up to 7°C without optimized fan voltage (18V reduced discrepancy to 6°C)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message passing between controller, low-level driver, and simulation models; RabbitMQ server runs on Raspberry Pi for local synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; controller enforces temperature limits (LL/UL) to prevent unsafe operating conditions."
]
